title: Vibrant Polish Cauliflower Curry
description: A herbal, juicy, adventurous Polish dish featuring cauliflower, tadka, and macrobiotic-friendly ingredients cooked in a terracotta dish.
instructions: Place the terracotta dish on medium heat and warm it gradually to avoid cracking.
Add olive oil to the dish and swirl to coat the base evenly.
Toss in diced onion and sauté until translucent and fragrant, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and grated ginger, and cook until aromatic, about 30 seconds.
Add cauliflower florets and stir to brown lightly, about 5 minutes.
Pour in tomato puree and coconut milk, then stir in ground cumin, coriander, and turmeric.
Cover the dish, reduce heat to low, and simmer gently for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally until cauliflower is tender.
Uncover, season with salt to taste, and stir in fresh cilantro and lemon juice.
Remove from heat, let rest for 5 minutes, then serve hot directly from the terracotta dish.
